dc_description_s: This data represents land use for Rock County, Wisconsin in 2026.[The Rock County Land Use Inventory was designed using a Classification System designed by Planning Staff to be able to capture land use traits important in staff decisions. The main purpose of the inventory is to is to describe what actually takes place in physical or observable terms. This inventory was created using the 2025 6' imagery, and 3' imagery when available.Please note:The classification system in this Inventory is NOT COMPATIBLE with the APA LBCS that was used in the 2000 Land Use Inventory. Users SHOULD NOT use the numerical codes as a basis of analysis between the two data sets.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
